title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies family as a Curriculum Developer in Patna. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies:
StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies!
